title: Background Cherry Shaded
description: A shaded version of vanilla cherry panorama.
body:
# Background Cherry Shaded
A shaded version of vanilla panoramas, adding depth and visual richness to the game's background. This enhancement brings a fresh, immersive feel while preserving the original aesthetic.

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee181deaafda972deca8e36a97b3bb6e80cb571b_0.webp)

### Adicional resource packs used in Screenshot
- [Cool Font "finished"](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cool-font-finished)
